The 3-day horizon allows for accumulation of these daily fluctuations, influenced by broader market sentiment or any potential company-specific news (e.g., drug development updates, regulatory announcements) that could emerge in the short term, thereby widening the higher confidence intervals to account for greater uncertainty.
